title: Morgan’s Rule Turns Violent
description: On pages 13–16, this part moves through Shells Town and the first clues about Zoro, Morgan, and Helmeppo’s abuse of power.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: I'm sure you've heard how scary my father can be!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: IF YOU WERE AN ADULT, YOU WOULD BE PUT TO DEATH!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: YOU THERE! THROW THAT BRAT OVER THE FENCE!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: B-BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: I'm ordering you to throw that little brat over the fence!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Are you going to disobey a direct order!?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I'll tell Daddy on you!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Y-YES SIR... RIGHT AWAY!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Yah!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: ARE YOU OKAY!?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: WHAT A BAD MAN...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My, aren't you a stubborn one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THAT'S RIGHT, I'M GONNA LAST OUT THE ENTIRE MONTH!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: YOU JUST KEEP YOUR END OF THE BAR- GAIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HA HA HA HA! I WON'T DREAM OF BREAKING MY WORD.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you survive out here for a month, then I'll let you go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IT'S MY PLEA- SURE, I'M SURE!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: You still here?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Better not let Helmepo's father catch you.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Look...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I'm looking for good men to join my pirate crew.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: pirate crew?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: You think I'd lower myself to that level? No thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: BUT BECOMING A PIRATE'S MY DREAM!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: What's WRONG WITH IT!?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: YOU THINK IF YOU UNTIE ME...

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: I'm gonna join your pirate crew?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I HAVEN'T DECIDED IF I'LL ASK YOU YET...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: YOU'VE GOT A PRETTY BAD REPU- TATION, YOU KNOW?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: BAD REPUTA- TION, HUH?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Well, anyway, I don't go for that kind of deal.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I'VE GOT MY OWN PLANS FOR THE FUTURE.

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
